title: Prior-lap driver state
summary: Add causal lag features from the previous observed lap for the same driver and race.
rationale: Chronological context was explored often and is natural for next-lap pit prediction. Previous tyre age, pace loss, position, and compound changes can identify transitions without future leakage.
implementation_hint: Sort by race, driver, and lap; shift `TyreLife`, `LapTime_Delta`, `Cumulative_Degradation`, `Position`, `Position_Change`, `PitStop`, and `Compound` by one row within each sequence. Add deltas from current to previous and previous-compound-same flags, then restore original order.
expected_effect: Small to medium ROC AUC gain with medium confidence.
risk: Sorting keys must include race-year context where available; missing or duplicated laps require stable tie handling.
